name: ngspice
description: Open source mixed-level/mixed-signal circuit simulator based on the SPICE3f5, Cider1b1, and Xspice codes.

name: Xyce
description: Parallel SPICE-compatible circuit simulator developed at Sandia National Laboratories. Designed for large-scale simulation on HPC platforms.

name: QUCS-S
description: Quite Universal Circuit Simulator with SPICE backends. Supports ngspice, Xyce, and SpiceOpus as simulation engines.

name: PySpice
description: Python library to interface with SPICE simulators (ngspice/Xspice). Enables programmatic netlist generation and simulation control.

name: ahkab
description: A SPICE-like electronic circuit simulator written in Python, supporting DC, AC, transient, and noise analysis.

name: KLayout
description: High-performance GDS and OASIS layout viewer and editor with scripting support via Ruby and Python. Widely used in open PDK workflows.

name: Magic VLSI
description: VLSI layout editor with built-in DRC, extraction, and routing. The standard open-source layout tool for the SkyWater 130nm PDK flow.

name: gdsfactory
description: Python library for designing chips and photonic integrated circuits. Generates GDS layouts programmatically with a component-based workflow.

name: Xschem
description: Schematic capture program for VLSI/analog circuit design. Native integration with ngspice and Magic for a full open-source IC design flow.

name: SkyWater PDK
description: Google-sponsored fully open-source 130nm CMOS process design kit from SkyWater Technology. Enables manufacturable chip tape-outs.

name: GF180MCU PDK
description: Open-source 180nm mixed-signal CMOS PDK from GlobalFoundries. Suitable for analog, mixed-signal, and power management designs.

name: ALIGN
description: Analog Layout, Intelligently Generated from Netlists. Automates analog layout generation from SPICE netlists targeting open PDKs.

name: GTKWave
description: Fully featured waveform viewer for VCD, FST, and LXT formats. Widely used for viewing simulation output from SPICE and digital simulators.

name: spyci
description: Python library for parsing and analyzing ngspice raw output files. Enables post-processing of SPICE simulation results in Python/NumPy.

name: IIC-OSIC-TOOLS
description: Comprehensive Docker image bundling a full open-source IC design environment including ngspice, Magic, KLayout, Xschem, and more.

name: CACE
description: Circuit Automatic Characterization Engine. Automates the characterization and specification verification of analog/mixed-signal circuits.
